recommendations.title: Amber Alert
recommendations.overview: A ride-share turns into a high-stakes game of cat and mouse after it follows a car fitting the description of an AMBER Alert.

recommendations.title: Vai Que Dá Certo
recommendations.overview: 5 friends have a plan to rob a transporter that can change their lives.

recommendations.title: Loft
recommendations.overview: Five close friends, all of them married, share a loft to meet their mistresses. One day they find the body of a young woman in the loft. Since there are only five keys to the loft, the five men begin to suspect each other of murder.

recommendations.title: Four's a Crowd
recommendations.overview: Julián, a divorced man with financial problems, uses a cell phone application to share his car with strangers.

recommendations.title: Soul Survivors
recommendations.overview: A college freshman involved in a fatal car crash discovers she may not have survived after all when she becomes caught between the worlds of the living and the dead.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo! in Where's My Mummy?
recommendations.genres: Mystery, Animation, Family, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Scooby-Doo and the Mystery Inc. gang become involved in a supernatural mystery in Egypt.

recommendations.title: Ne Zha
recommendations.overview: A young boy is born as the reincarnation of a demonic power, into a society that hates and fears him. Destined by prophecy to bring destruction to the world, Nezha must choose between good and evil to see if he can change his fate.

recommendations.title: The Thing About Harry
recommendations.overview: Two high school enemies, uber-jock Harry and out-and-proud Sam, are forced to share a car ride to their Missouri hometown for a friend's engagement party on Valentine's Day. Things take a turn when Sam learns Harry has come out.

recommendations.title: The Legendary Giulia and Other Miracles
recommendations.overview: Five down-on-their luck strangers meet by chance while looking at a property in the country none of them are able to afford. They decide to join forces and risk everything to turn it into a B&B, only for the local mafia to show up demanding their "fa

recommendations.title: Mr Hublot
recommendations.overview: Mr Hublot is a withdrawn, idiosyncratic character with OCD, scared of change and the outside world. Robot Pet's arrival turns his life upside down: he has to share his home with this very invasive companion.
